title: Macaw's Regions Unexplored
description: A compatibility between Macaw's Mods and the different woods of Regions Unexplored
body:
This mod adds compatibility between Macaw's Mods and Regions Unexplored, have you always dreamed of making an redwood bridge... well thanks to this mod it is now something possible!

Bioshroom Stuff :
![Bioshroom Stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4d7eGKIA/images/c8bbfb089bc23bb90b016fcb9dd527b5ee40d116.png)

Magnolia Stuff :
![Magnolia Stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4d7eGKIA/images/cbfabe162b0eaf2bc45a5d24da1d16c3e3035219.png)

Mauve Stuff :
![Mauve Stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4d7eGKIA/images/4234307742b844257cdabeffbd09fa1f7b4e6c3c.png)

**Required Depedency:**

[AddonsLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/addonslib)

[Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored)

**Optional Dependency:**

[Macaw's Mods](https://modrinth.com/user/sketchmacaw)
